supporting_quote: FUS RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Human FUS primer probe set RTS38562. A-431 dose-response: 'FUS levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN'. No housekeeping gene used for the in-vitro readout.

supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by real time RT-PCR are normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreen(TM).
notes: NOT bDNA/QuantiGene as CLAUDE.md speculated for this old 2005 patent; HepG2 in-vitro data are quantitative real-time RT-PCR ('analyzed for their effect on human apolipoprotein B mRNA levels in HepG2 cells by quantitative real-time PCR'). Boilerplate gives either/or (GAPDH or RiboGreen total-RNA); tables reported as normalized to untreated control. A separate Northern-blot method states 'Data was normalized to GAPDH'. Basis recorded as total_RNA_ribogreen per Ionis default but GAPDH is an explicitly allowed alternative.

supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by RT, real-time PCR were normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: HepG2 in-vitro uses the either/or boilerplate (GAPDH or RIBOGREEN total RNA). Explicit RIBOGREEN total-RNA statement is given for in-vivo mouse liver ('liver glucagon receptor mRNA was measured (normalized to total RNA in the same samples using Ribogreen)'). A Northern-blot method elsewhere normalizes to GAPDH. Basis recorded as total_RNA_ribogreen per Ionis default; GAPDH is an explicit alternative.

supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by RT, real-time PCR were normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: A549 huntingtin mRNA measured 'by quantitative real-time PCR as described in other examples herein', reported as percent inhibition relative to untreated cells. Methods (Example 2) give the standard either/or normalizer with no A549-specific override; sequence listing is RTS0838. Basis recorded as total_RNA_ribogreen per Ionis default; GAPDH is an explicit allowed alternative.

supporting_quote: LRRK2 RNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the table below as percent LRRK2 RNA levels relative to untreated control cells.
notes: In-vitro (incl. SH-SY5Y) uses RIBOGREEN total-RNA with primer probe sets RTS3132/RTS3133/RTS3146/RTS3043. SURPRISE: cyclophilin A is used as the normalizer ONLY for in-vivo transgenic-mouse spinal cord ('normalized with cyclophilin A', primer set hLRRK2 LTS35700) -- not for the SH-SY5Y in-vitro data assigned here.
